note: RWALL-3 FIXED: partial-grout Anv incl. grouted cells (REK-05 basis, Anv=968 in² at No.4@40). fv f'm-independent so fm=2000 acceptable.

expected.label: OOP shear stress fv (calc V basis; MDG 13.95 at V=106)

note: RWALL-4/5/7 FIXED. wWind is ULTIMATE C&C (x0.6 internal). M asserted at 3% tol: calc simple-span 410.88 vs MDG 400 (MDG includes parapet reaction relief) - conservative, disclosed. fv asserted at calc V=102.7 basis (13.52); MDG 13.95 uses parapet-augmented V=106; the Anv=7.60 area basis (the finding) reproduces exactly.

RWALL-6 resolved: TMS Eq. 8-16 coefficient IS 0.30 (original finding's 0.25 was a misciting - verified tms_full.txt:7301); real fixes were partial-grout An/In/r (NCMA TEK 14-1B basis, eta=0.867 documented) and dropping untied 0.65AstFs per MDG REK-03. Pa=16357 vs MDG 16300 (0.35%).

source.reference: TMS 402-22 Table 11.3.1 + hand statics (EOR-authorized hand benchmark)

note: URWALL-3/4/5 FIXED: Fb=f'm/3 (500.0), Pe/4 buckling check (e=0 disclosed), OOP shear check per §8.2.6/MDG 11.3-1. Unity expected moved 0.28->0.27 as the direct arithmetic consequence of correcting Fb (fb/Fb term shrinks).

expected.label: allowable flexural tension Ft (Type S hollow)
